chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-584 of 2022 (Wahabuddin and another Vs. SHO PS Rohri & others) 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing o of MA No. 4980/2022 (Stay) 31-10-2023. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, advocate for the applicants. Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi advocate for the private respondent. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, DPG for the State. >>>>>>>...<<<<<<<< 1. Over ruled. 2. By preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr.P.C, the applicants have impugned an order dated 03-11-2022 passed by learned Ist Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Sukkur, whereby he has directed SHO PS Rohri to record statement of the private respondent and then to incorporate the same into FIR on disclosure of cognizable offence. No illegality is pointed which may justify this Court to make interference with impugned order by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application; consequently, it is dismissed a/w listed application. J U D G E Nasim/P.A. 2
